title: DEP — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Environmental Protection (DEP) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DEP Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/dep, and the login-walled My DEP Account customer portal (a826-umax.dep.nyc.gov, the uMAX Customer Information System). Includes the NYC geography spine and DEP's tax-lot (Block/Lot/BBL) addressing used by its permits and green-infrastructure assets.

Coordinates.description: WGS84 point (Open Data LATITUDE / LONGITUDE or POINT_X / POINT_Y reprojected).

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across DEP datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government. Several DEP GIS datasets carry these only as Socrata computed regions (:@computed_region_*).

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code.

policePrecinct.description: 'Police Precincts' computed region carried by DEP GIS datasets.

TaxLot.description: Property tax-lot addressing used by DEP permits and regulated assets ('Block', 'Lot', 'Borough', 'PropertyZip').

WaterBodyReference.description: Receiving-water / drainage context carried by DEP stormwater and green-infrastructure assets.

sewerType.description: Sewer shed type ('Sewer_Type') — combined vs. separate.
